name: com.apple.webClip.managed
title: Web Clip
description: The profile that configures web clips on the device.

payloadkeys.title: Precomposed Icon
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system prevents SpringBoard from adding shine to the icon.

payloadkeys.title: Full Screen
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system launches the web clip as a full-screen web app.

payloadkeys.title: URL
payloadkeys.content: The URL of the web clip.

payloadkeys.title: Icon
payloadkeys.content: The PNG icon to show on the Home Screen. If not set, the system displays a white square. For best results, provide a square image that's no larger than 400 x 400 pixels and less than 1 MB when uncompressed. The graphics file is automatically scaled and cropped to fit, if necessary, and converted to PNG format. Web clip icons are 144 x 144 pixels for iPad devices with a Retina display, and 114 x 114 pixels for iPhone devices. To prevent the device from adding a shine to the image, set `Precomposed` to `true`.

payloadkeys.title: Removable
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, the system enables removing the web clip.

payloadkeys.title: Label
payloadkeys.content: The name of the web clip that the system displays on the Home Screen.

payloadkeys.title: Ignore Web Clip manifest scope
payloadkeys.content: If `true`, a full screen web clip can navigate to an external web site without showing Safari UI. Otherwise, Safari UI appears when navigating away from the web clip's URL. This key has no effect when `FullScreen` is `false`. Available in iOS 14 and later.

payloadkeys.title: Target Application Bundle Identifier
payloadkeys.content: The application bundle identifier of the application that opens the URL. To use this property, install the profile through MDM. Available in iOS 14 and later.
